STIPULATION TO ADR FILED BY TWO THOUSAND AND SIX WASHINGTON STREET INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION THE LAWSON ROOFING CO., INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION MOSHE H. ALAFI, TRUSTEE OF THE CHRISTOPHER DAVID ALAFI TRUST
TALBE OF NON CALIFORNIA AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TWO THOUSAND AND SIX WASHINGTON STREET INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT THE LAWSON ROOFING CO., INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2, 3 AND 4 BECAUSE FACTS ALLEGED THAT COULD TRIGGER SECTION 337.15 AS APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATION; AND SUSTAINED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 5 AND 6 WITH LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN 10 DAYS BECAUSE FACTS ALLEGED AS NUISANCE AND TRESPASS ARE ONLY CONSEQUENCES OF DEFENDANT'S ALLEGED CONDUCT, NOT THE CONDUCT ITSELF. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: SARAH LERSCHEN CSR #6213

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE LAWSON ROOFING CO., INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled as to Causes of Action 1, 2, 3 and 4 because facts alleged that could trigger Section 337.15 as applicable statute of limitation; and sustained as to Causes of Action 5 and 6 with leave to amend within 10 days because facts alleged as nuisance and trespass are only consequences of defendant's alleged conduct, not the conduct itself. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/x-gw) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR 6213
